Package noppes.npcs.api.handler.data

Interface IFaction

  • public interface IFaction

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addEnemyFaction​(IFaction faction)
      Adds a faction as an enemy of this faction.
      boolean attackedByMobs()  
      int getColor()  
      int getDefaultPoints()  
      IFaction[] getEnemyFactions()  
      int getFriendlyPoints()  
      int getId()  
      boolean getIsHidden()  
      String getName()  
      int getNeutralPoints()  
      boolean isAggressiveToNpc​(ICustomNpc npc)
      Checks whether this faction is hostile toward the given NPC's faction.
      boolean isEnemyFaction​(IFaction faction)
      Checks whether the given faction is an enemy of this faction.
      boolean isPassive()  
      int playerStatus​(IPlayer player)
      Returns the player's standing with this faction.
      void removeEnemyFaction​(IFaction faction)
      Removes a faction from this faction's enemy list.
      void save()
      Saves the faction data to the server.
      void setAttackedByMobs​(boolean attacked)
      Sets whether NPCs in this faction can be attacked by hostile mobs.
      void setColor​(int c)
      Sets the faction's display color.
      void setDefaultPoints​(int var1)
      Sets the default faction points assigned to new players.
      void setFriendlyPoints​(int p)
      Sets the point threshold at or above which a player is considered friendly.
      void setIsHidden​(boolean hidden)
      Sets whether this faction is hidden from the player's faction list.
      void setIsPassive​(boolean passive)
      Sets whether NPCs in this faction are passive.
      void setName​(String name)
      Sets the faction's display name.
      void setNeutralPoints​(int p)
      Sets the point threshold below which a player is considered an enemy.

    • Method Detail

      • getId

        int getId()
        Returns:
        The faction's unique ID

      • getName

        String getName()
        Returns:
        The faction's display name

      • setName

        void setName​(String name)
        Sets the faction's display name.
        Parameters:
        name - The new name

      • setDefaultPoints

        void setDefaultPoints​(int var1)
        Sets the default faction points assigned to new players.
        Parameters:
        var1 - The default point value

      • getDefaultPoints

        int getDefaultPoints()
        Returns:
        The default faction points assigned to new players

      • setFriendlyPoints

        void setFriendlyPoints​(int p)
        Sets the point threshold at or above which a player is considered friendly.
        Parameters:
        p - The friendly point threshold

      • getFriendlyPoints

        int getFriendlyPoints()
        Returns:
        The point threshold at or above which a player is considered friendly

      • setNeutralPoints

        void setNeutralPoints​(int p)
        Sets the point threshold below which a player is considered an enemy.
        Parameters:
        p - The neutral point threshold

      • getNeutralPoints

        int getNeutralPoints()
        Returns:
        The point threshold below which a player is considered an enemy

      • setColor

        void setColor​(int c)
        Sets the faction's display color.
        Parameters:
        c - The color as an RGB integer

      • getColor

        int getColor()
        Returns:
        The faction's display color as an RGB integer

      • playerStatus

        int playerStatus​(IPlayer player)
        Returns the player's standing with this faction.
        Parameters:
        player - The player to check
        Returns:
        1 for friendly, 0 for neutral, -1 for enemy

      • isAggressiveToNpc

        boolean isAggressiveToNpc​(ICustomNpc npc)
        Checks whether this faction is hostile toward the given NPC's faction.
        Parameters:
        npc - The NPC to check against
        Returns:
        True if this faction is aggressive toward the NPC

      • getIsHidden

        boolean getIsHidden()
        Returns:
        Whether this faction is hidden from the player's faction list

      • setIsHidden

        void setIsHidden​(boolean hidden)
        Sets whether this faction is hidden from the player's faction list.
        Parameters:
        hidden - True to hide the faction

      • isPassive

        boolean isPassive()
        Returns:
        Whether NPCs in this faction are passive and will not attack

      • setIsPassive

        void setIsPassive​(boolean passive)
        Sets whether NPCs in this faction are passive.
        Parameters:
        passive - True to make faction NPCs passive

      • attackedByMobs

        boolean attackedByMobs()
        Returns:
        Whether NPCs in this faction can be attacked by hostile mobs

      • setAttackedByMobs

        void setAttackedByMobs​(boolean attacked)
        Sets whether NPCs in this faction can be attacked by hostile mobs.
        Parameters:
        attacked - True to allow mobs to attack faction NPCs

      • isEnemyFaction

        boolean isEnemyFaction​(IFaction faction)
        Checks whether the given faction is an enemy of this faction.
        Parameters:
        faction - The faction to check
        Returns:
        True if the given faction is an enemy

      • getEnemyFactions

        IFaction[] getEnemyFactions()
        Returns:
        An array of all factions that are enemies of this faction

      • addEnemyFaction

        void addEnemyFaction​(IFaction faction)
        Adds a faction as an enemy of this faction.
        Parameters:
        faction - The faction to add as an enemy

      • removeEnemyFaction

        void removeEnemyFaction​(IFaction faction)
        Removes a faction from this faction's enemy list.
        Parameters:
        faction - The faction to remove

      • save

        void save()
        Saves the faction data to the server.
